text: @MurimaMaestro Wueh Olkalau watauliwa na maendeleo. Alafu what is Kasongo obsession with Kikuyus ama hataki watu ya broadbased.
label: neither
rationale: Rhetorical question about a politician's (Kasongo's) alleged ethnic preference - criticism of an individual's behaviour, not collective contempt for Kikuyus.

text: @Hitormisssince @ntvkenya @MichelleNgele_ Eeeh...nawaona kama matako kubwa tena ile inanuka, mtu akisema ukweli mnasema ni mkabila na nyinyi ndio wakabila wakubwa sana.
label: offensive
rationale: Crude bodily insult ('matako kubwa tena ile inanuka') aimed at interlocutors as individuals, then accusing them of tribalism - vulgar personal abuse not grounded in ethnic targeting.

text: "Police are aware of criminals like Gachagua who are planning violence in Ol Kalou" ~ The most useless CS in Kenya bwana Kipchumba Murkomen
label: offensive
rationale: 'Most useless CS' and framing Murkomen's statement as false - personal insults aimed at two named politicians, no ethnic targeting.

text: @GibNabson @etadv Theuri is just a polished Gachagua. Just another tribal bigot. To this Orangutan, any president who is not from Morima is bad and must be fought and be removed from power. Makende ya nyani huyu mkabila. He failed terribly during his tenure as president of LSK. SHEEEEEEEENZI....
label: offensive
rationale: 'Orangutan', 'nyani', 'mkabila', 'sheeenzi' are directed at named individual Theuri; 'mkabila' here labels him a tribalist, not an attack on his ethnic community as a group.

text: Wamunyoro tribal bigots must referee our referee!
label: hate
rationale: 'Wamunyoro tribal bigots' collectively attributes the characteristic of tribal bigotry to the entire Wamunyoro community - NCIC collective negative attribution.

text: @LabanMbunya So 45 days consultations ilikua ya nini? Hehehe.sema kimeumana!! But what options does he have anyway? it is either Kalonzo or kalonzo. Delaying it to even July will not change anything
label: neither
rationale: 'Kimeumana' used here in its political commentary sense - things have gone badly for a politician; electoral analysis with no group attack.

text: @smutoro Wetangula shamelessly keeps repeating in every public meeting that "Kenya haitaki mkabila kama ule Wamûnyoro na shares". The president does the same and he has filled members of his ethnic community in executive & state corporations.
label: neither
rationale: Reporting and criticising what Wetangula allegedly says and the president's alleged ethnic patronage - condemnation of individual politicians' tribalism, not collective contempt for any community.

text: @Dennis_Itumbi02 😂 now when ruto has failed the mama mbogas and hustlers and became a thief and a killer now you are coming to us with a tribal card... fala ww itumbi
label: offensive
rationale: 'Thief', 'killer', 'fala' directed at Ruto and Itumbi as named individuals; no transfer onto an ethnic community.

text: This time round wameenda kuscam Ol kalou electorate wakitumia chinese 😂😂
label: neither
rationale: Accusation of electoral scamming using Chinese phones - political criticism of unnamed actors, no ethnic contempt.

text: @MoraraKebaso Rubishhh peleka ukisii Yako huko wewe ndio umekua ukifight Sifuna last week yet you know how popular he is on ground anything you say from that moment on I take you as a dangerous TROJAN PLANTED IN JUBILEE
label: neither
rationale: 'Peleka ukisii yako huko' - 'go back to Kisii' addressed to an individual could be dismissive but reads in context as factional political insult, not collective contempt for the Kisii community; borderline, lower severity chosen.

text: @Kibet_bull Kasongo ndo shetani mkubwa hii nchi
label: offensive
rationale: 'Shetani mkubwa' ('biggest devil') is a personal insult aimed at named individual Kasongo, not an ethnic group.

text: @alfredarapketer Mjinga akierevuka mwerevu yuko mashakani WANTAM
label: neither
rationale: Proverb ('when a fool wises up the clever is in trouble') used as political banter - no attack on any protected group.

text: Kabogo had warned the Despot. "Kiambu residents can chew your money dry and then send you packing" Says one William to another William through experience ‼️😂 🤣
label: neither
rationale: Quoting Kabogo's warning about Kiambu voters as a political insight; no contempt for Kiambu residents, the framing is admiring of their savvy.

text: Afternoon views.
label: neither
rationale: Unintelligible standalone phrase with no discernible content or target.

text: @M_deno_ @itskipronoh Kikuyu hatuna akili, but ask yourself, ushawaiskia UDA imekuja campaigns huko? look at Kimani's fb page on what he is doing kwa ground then anakuja huku twitter kuimba tutam. bora anafanya kazi, MP anarudi but asitwambie shiet
label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyu hatuna akili' collectively attributes lack of intelligence to the Kikuyu community - NCIC contempt even though the speaker appears to self-identify as Kikuyu; collective negative attribution to the group is hate under the standard.

text: @pksalasya You and that Eugene are nonstarters and village leaders. We luhyas only listen to SIFUNA. #sisindiosifuna . Wewe ni mtu useless kabisa🚮
label: neither
rationale: Intra-Luhya factional politics asserting Sifuna's supremacy over named rivals; 'useless' is a personal insult, and 'we Luhyas' is electoral bloc assertion, not contempt for another group.

text: @JoelKuriaNjugu3 Murkomen should resign , no one listens to this incompetent porn addict
label: offensive
rationale: 'Incompetent porn addict' is personal abuse of named politician Murkomen; no ethnic dimension.

text: -KIKUYUS, You can be BITTER TILL END of the WORLD, OR KILL YOURSELVES 😊😊 -BUT SOMALIS are HERE in Kenya FOREVER 😁😁. -SOMALIS in Kenya are GOING NOWHERE 🤗. -INFACT, OVER 2 MILLION VOTES FOR WILLIAM RUTO ARE SOMALIS in 2027.@WilliamsRuto -Somalis are GOOD PEOPLE 🤗🤗
label: hate
rationale: 'Kill yourselves' directed at Kikuyus as a collective is both a violence call against an ethnic group and collective contempt - clear hate under NCIC regardless of the pro-Somali framing.

text: @NjiruAdv Kiaa,. Hii kiti nayo wakukuyu hawaioni karibuni
label: neither
rationale: Electoral forecast that Kikuyus will not hold the presidency soon - ethnic-bloc political analysis without contempt or negative collective attribution.

text: I love that she always has that look of disdain for the plight of regular Kenyans… but she might get elected bc of the parasocial r.ship Kenyans have w her online persona 😂
label: neither
rationale: Criticism of an unnamed individual (likely a politician) for appearing detached from voters; no ethnic or group targeting.

text: Rigathi Gachagua holds a Wamunyoro Consultative Meeting with Othaya Constituency grassroots leaders.
label: neither
rationale: Factual reporting of a political meeting; no contempt, no attack on any group.

text: @Wakabando Utaambia watu nini inauguration ya 2nd term ya his excellency? Ama mtahama kenya mkiwa na tribal monger? You're a perfect example of a lousy leader,tembea kikuyu constituency ujionee venye wanaume hufanya maendeleo. #Wirawarie,tutam ride or die.
label: neither
rationale: Personal insult to an addressee ('tribal monger', 'lousy leader') and pro-Ruto political argument; directing someone to observe Kikuyu constituency development is a rhetorical point, not collective contempt.

text: @FabrizioRomano @vickervics9 He should just tender his resignation and leave in peace. He will be ripped apart by the English media
label: neither
rationale: Comment on an unnamed individual's career prospects; no Kenyan political or ethnic content.

text: "Hakuna Mluhya anapinga Sifuna. Wale wanampinga kama Musalia si mluhya, ni mnandi kutoka Chepsenoi...Wetangula ni mganda kutoka Nalondo...Salasya na yeye mkikuyu. Nyinyi mmeona wapi mluhya ako na lips za red kama za Salasya!"~Angry Kakamega man
label: hate
rationale: Quoted speech excludes named rivals from Luhya identity by ethnic sub-group origin and mocks Salasya with a physical characteristic tied to Kikuyu identity - attributing ethnic inauthenticity is collective contempt under NCIC; quoting without condemnation makes the author responsible for the content.

text: @ntvkenya Murkomen is the most stupid CS we have in government.
label: offensive
rationale: 'Most stupid CS' is a personal insult directed at named politician Murkomen; no ethnic dimension.
